title: Remote Product Designer Jobs in Canada | Montreal Jobs
description: Find the best remote product designer jobs across Canada. Real listings from top Canadian tech companies, salary ranges in CAD, and expert search tips.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary for a remote Product Designer in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on current market data, a mid-level remote Product Designer in Canada typically earns between $95,000 and $130,000 CAD per year. Senior designers can expect $130,000 to $170,000+ CAD, especially at larger tech companies or US-based startups hiring remotely in Canada.

mainEntity.name: Do Canadian companies hire remote designers outside their province?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, many Canadian tech companies (like Shopify, Wealthsimple, and 1Password) operate with a 'Remote-First' or 'Work from Anywhere in Canada' policy. This means you can live in Halifax, Montreal, or Calgary and work for a company headquartered in Toronto or Vancouver.

mainEntity.name: Are US companies hiring remote Product Designers in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. Many US tech companies hire Canadian talent remotely. They often use Employers of Record (EOR) like Deel or Remote.com to handle payroll and compliance. These roles frequently pay at the top of the Canadian market or even in USD.

mainEntity.name: What portfolio elements do remote-first companies look for?

acceptedAnswer.text: Remote-first companies highly value explicit documentation of your process. They look for portfolios that demonstrate how you collaborate asynchronously, how you communicate design decisions in writing, and your ability to drive projects independently without constant supervision.
